Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SurgeOscillationState

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SurgeOscillationState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem
public static class AdvancedAntiSurgeControlSystem.SurgeOscillationState extends Object implements Serializable
Lumped educational surge-oscillation model state.
